name: Black Beans and Rice Salad, a Fatfree Variation
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons chopped fresh cilantro, or less to taste
salt and ground black pepper -- to taste
recipeInstructions:
Variation from the original: I substituted fat-free Italian salad dressing for the olive oil and eliminated the Spanish olives and the roasted walnut garnish.
In a mixing bowl, combine the drained beans with the rice and celery. In a small bowl, whisk together all of the dressing ingredients. Pour the dressing over the beans and rice mixture, and stir thoroughly. Top with the cilantro or parsley.
